children.name: div
children.textContent: Gate change reduced your buffer — tap to update plan

children.name: div
children.textContent: Your platform changed. Add 4 min to your return time. Buffer reduced to 9 min — update plan recommended.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Light drizzle expected near south exits. Your plan uses the indoor B1 route — no change needed.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Shinkansen N700 to Osaka is confirmed on schedule. Departure 16:09 from Platform 14.

children.name: div
children.textContent: East Wing Lounge is full. Alternative: North Concourse near exit C has 4 free outlets.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Coin Locker B2 has 5 large slots free (2 min walk). Drop your bag to extend walk radius by +200 m.
